summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Life Graph vector-based memory system for missiAI. All 140 tests pass including 95 new tests for the Life Graph implementation.
passed_tests: Type exports: MemoryCategory, LifeNode, LifeGraph, MemorySearchResult, legacy types (11 tests)
Embeddings: generateEmbedding with Gemini API, cosineSimilarity calculations, buildEmbeddingText formatting (14 tests)
Vectorize operations: upsertLifeNode, searchSimilarNodes with filtering and scoring, deleteUserVectors (8 tests)
Life Graph core: getLifeGraph, saveLifeGraph with versioning, addOrUpdateNode with merging logic, searchLifeGraph with KV fallback, formatLifeGraphForPrompt (23 tests)
Graph extractor: extractLifeNodes with JSON parsing, validation, deduplication, error handling (13 tests)
Schema validation: memorySchema with interactionCount field validation (12 tests)
AI service integration: buildSystemPrompt with personality and memory formatting (14 tests)
All existing tests continue to pass (45 tests)
